gigaStakingMigration.title: GIGA staking migration
gigaStakingMigration.lead: You have <0>{{amount, number}} HDX</0> staked in Legacy Staking, you can maximize your staking rewards with GIGA HDX.
gigaStakingMigration.followUp: With one click of a button you can migrate Legacy HDX and start earning those rewards.

gigaHdxDescription.points: How can I benefit from it?
Choose how many HDX you wish to stake - these can be unstaked at any time.
Participate in governance to speed up the rate at which you can claim rewards.
dashboard.title: Staking dashboard
dashboard.chart.legend.afterVoting.help: Your rewards will be updated when referenda which you voted for will be Approved or Rejected.
You have to vote max conviction with whole staking position.
dashboard.remainder2: Claiming resets your boost and forfeits
dashboard.remainder2.mobile: Claiming resets your boost and forfeits <0>{{ amount, number }} unclaimable {{ symbol }}</0> rewards.
dashboard.supplyStaked.title: {{ symbol }} Supply Staked
dashboard.projectedAPR.tooltip: Estimated rewards based on your stakeable HDX balance.
This is a rough estimate subject to continuous change.
It is determined by your share in the stake pool, as well as variable rewards streams.
howTo.title: How to stake?
howTo.points: You can easily get HDX by swapping from a range of assets on our <0>trade page.</0>
Choose how many HDX you wish to stake - these can be unstaked at any time.
Participate in governance to speed up the rate at which you can claim rewards.
Rewards can be claimed at any time - however, be aware that this could forfeit your unavailable portion.

referenda.emptyState.description: Currently there are no ongoing referenda to vote in.
referenda.participate: Participate in governance to speed up the rate at which you can claim your staking rewards.
